title: AntiPhysics
description: This plugin will disable physics for blocks with gravity.
body:
This plugin will disable physics for blocks with gravity.

(Useful for minecraft maps, lobbies, etc.)
Just install and use! The plugin is really lightweight and simple for using.

You can enable and disable the plugin in the config, select worlds, in which physics will be disabled, and reload the plugin with "/ap reload" command.

It only works appropriately with paper. Avoid using a spigot or bukkit

permissions:
- antiphysics.all

You can also order me to write a plugin for you here:
https://www.fiverr.com/ocejlot/write-a-minecraft-plugin-for-you
